Title: Authorizes the village of Hempstead to amortize payments made to town employees upon separation from employment over a period of twenty years
Summary: Authorizes the village of Hempstead, in the county of Nassau, to amortize payments made on or after April 1, 2026 to town employees upon separation from employment over a period of twenty years.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the local finance law, in relation to authorizing the village of Hempstead, in the county of Nassau, to amortize the cost of certain payments to employees upon separation from service
